use_cases.abstract: Predicts component failures on H-60 helicopters from sensor telemetry to schedule maintenance before failure.
Computer vision pipeline that identifies vehicles and infrastructure in commercial satellite imagery for analyst triage.
Forecasts spare-parts demand across CONUS depots using 5 years of historical requisition data.
Unsupervised model that detects anomalous lateral movement on .mil networks and alerts SOC analysts.
OCR + LLM pipeline that extracts structured fields from scanned VA benefits paperwork.
